intro: Astrophytum ornatum, also known as the pincushion cactus or star cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico, characterized by its rounded, globose shape and short, fine spines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and reduce the risk of infection. Bioactive constituents of Astrophytum ornatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
